scope: DM1/V1 inventory panel open/draw order and source slot-box namespace; not V2 art acceptance

sourceRanges.assertion: Action-hand object type selects chest/scroll/food-water panel before drawing the corresponding panel.
Inventory toggle/close commands C007..C011 dispatch to F0355_INVENTORY_Toggle_CPSE when no candidate champion blocks input.

Opening inventory sets G0423_i_InventoryChampionOrdinal, expands C017 inventory backdrop, draws all champion slots with F0291, marks redraw attributes, then switches secondary input to ChampionInventory.
Inventory champion slots use C08_SLOT_BOX_INVENTORY_FIRST_SLOT + slot, draw into the viewport, and call F0038_OBJECT_DrawIconInSlotBox.
Firestaff slot helper draws original 18x18 slot boxes and occupied 16x16 DM object icons.
Firestaff normal V1 inventory branch draws source slot boxes 8..37 and returns before debug/freehand layout.

nonClaims: Does not validate V2 inventory art quality or V2 asset manifests.
Does not prove chest contents mutation semantics or runtime click behavior.
Does not use deprecated remote source; source paths are ReDMCSB and Firestaff N2 only.
